/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-gcc.exe  -mtune=generic -Wall -Wvla -ffast-math -ftree-vectorize -D_GNU_SOURCE  -fmax-errors=1 -DUSE_CM108 -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--enable-auto-import CMakeFiles/decode_aprs.dir/decode_aprs.c.o CMakeFiles/decode_aprs.dir/ais.c.o CMakeFiles/decode_aprs.dir/kiss_frame.c.o CMakeFiles/decode_aprs.dir/ax25_pad.c.o CMakeFiles/decode_aprs.dir/dwgpsnmea.c.o CMakeFiles/decode_aprs.dir/dwgps.c.o CMakeFiles/decode_aprs.dir/serial_port.c.o CMakeFiles/decode_aprs.dir/symbols.c.o CMakeFiles/decode_aprs.dir/textcolor.c.o CMakeFiles/decode_aprs.dir/fcs_calc.c.o CMakeFiles/decode_aprs.dir/latlong.c.o CMakeFiles/decode_aprs.dir/log.c.o CMakeFiles/decode_aprs.dir/telemetry.c.o CMakeFiles/decode_aprs.dir/tt_text.c.o -o decode_aprs.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libdecode_aprs.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0  -lm ../external/misc/libmisc.a ../external/regex/libregex.a -lm
